name: laradock
desc: Full PHP development environment for Docker. Run Laravel, Symfony, CodeIgniter, Phalcon, WordPress, Drupal, Magento, Moodle, or any PHP project with 70+ pre-co…
descFull: Full PHP development environment for Docker. Run Laravel, Symfony, CodeIgniter, Phalcon, WordPress, Drupal, Magento, Moodle, or any PHP project with 70+ pre-configured services: Nginx, Apache, PHP-FPM, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch & more.
